title: unona alphonsii
intro: Unona alphonsii, also known as the African blue basil or African blue sage, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Unona alphonsii include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Unona alphonsii include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical applications for various health issues.
